zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Gray Knt.於大約1359年出生在英國諾圖波藍德希頓時，他的父親Thomas de Heaton38歲，母親Margaret de Percy28歲。他於大約1382年與Joan Mowbray結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於從1400年11月25日到1400年12月7日，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德貝林罕。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Gray Knt.于大约1359年出生在英国諾圖波藍德希頓时，他的父亲Thomas de Heaton38岁，母亲Margaret de Percy28岁。他于大约1382年与Joan Mowbray结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于从1400年11月25日到1400年12月7日，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德貝林罕。

nameMeanings.name: Gray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: McGreevy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Seamus, Brendan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Riabhaigh, a patronymic from the personal name Riabhach ‘brindled, grizzled’. Compare Reavey and Creevy 2.

variants.name: Grayer
meanings: English (southern): nickname from Middle English grei ‘gray’ (see Gray ) + her ‘hair’.

variants.name: Grays
meanings: English (Durham): variant of Gray , with post-medieval excrescent -s, or of Grace .

variants.name: Grice
meanings: English (Midlands): from Middle English grice, grise ‘pig’ (Old Norse gríss), probably a nickname or a metonymic occupational name for a swineherd.
English: nickname for a gray-haired man, from Middle English grice, gris ‘gray’ (Old French gris, apparently of ancient Germanic origin, and probably a distant cognate of Gray 1).
Possibly also an Americanized form of German   Greis  .

variants.name: Grey
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Gray Knt. was born about 1359, in Heaton, Northumberland, England, his father, Thomas de Heaton, was 38 and his mother, Margaret de Percy, was 28. He married Joan Mowbray about 1382. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died from 25 November 1400 to 7 December 1400, and was buried in Bellingham, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Gray Knt. est né environ 1359, à Heaton, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Heaton, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Percy, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Joan Mowbray environ 1382. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé du 25 novembre 1400 au 7 décembre 1400, et a été enterré à Bellingham, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Gray Knt. um 1359 in Heaton, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Heaton 38 und seine Mutter Margaret de Percy 28. Er hat um 1382 Joan Mowbray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb von 25. November 1400 bis 7. Dezember 1400 und wurde in Bellingham, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Gray Knt. è nato il circa 1359 nel Heaton, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Heaton, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Percy, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Joan Mowbray circa 1382. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì da 25 novembre 1400 a 7 dicembre 1400, e fu sepolto a Bellingham, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Gray Knt.が約1359年にイギリスノースウンバーランドヒートンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Heatonは38歳，母Margaret de Percyは28歳であった。約1382年にJoan Mowbrayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はから1400年11月25日まで1400年12月7日に死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドベリンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Gray Knt.(이)가 대략 1359년 영국 노르스벌랜드 히턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Heaton(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Percy(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1382년 Joan Mowbray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 11월 25일부터 1400년 12월 7일까지 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 벨링함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Gray Knt. nasceu aproximadamente 1359, em Heaton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Heaton, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Percy, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Mowbray aproximadamente 1382. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu de 25 de novembro de 1400 a 7 de dezembro de 1400, e foi sepultado em Bellingham, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Gray Knt. родился около 1359 г. в местности хитон, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Heaton было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Percy, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Mowbray около 1382 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер с 25 ноября 1400 по 7 декабря 1400 и был похоронен в местности беллингхам, нортумбирланд, Англия.
